style_effects: Intense orange-red embers drift upward in slow, lazy spirals around Gengar, crackling with tiny sparks that fade into the air. A searing crimson aura pulses rhythmically, casting a warm, flickering glow that casts long, dancing shadows. The lighting mood is a fiery amber, with heat shimmer distorting the air like a desert mirage. Clean cel-shaded Pokémon illustration style with bold outlines and soft shading.
